description: Refactor the travel agency graph schema in the 'demodb' database by promoting the 'HasStayed' relationship between Profiles and Hotels to a first-class vertex. Create a new vertex class 'StaySession' and two edge classes, 'HasSession' and 'SessionAt'. Migrate all existing 'HasStayed' data so that each Profile connects to a 'StaySession' via 'HasSession', and each 'StaySession' connects to a Hotel via 'SessionAt'. Once the migration is complete, delete the original 'HasStayed' edges. Access the database via OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html) or the Console using credentials root / GymAnything123!.
